india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank share price jumps 6% after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold the stock?
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank reported Q4FY26 net profit of ₹533 crore , as against a loss of ₹2,236 crore in the year-ago period. The bank’s net interest income (NII) increased 43.4% year-on-year (YoY) to ₹4,372 crore, while the net interest margin (NIM) improved to 3.39% from 2.25%.

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries shares fall after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold?
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries shares dropped over 1% after announcing a financial performance for FY26, with revenue up 9.8% to ₹1,175,919 crore and PAT rising 18.3% to ₹95,610 crore, despite challenges in the energy sector.

india_trends.summary: Investors are watching the Federal Reserve's meeting as the confirmation of Kevin Warsh looms. Precious metals face pressure from a strong dollar and rising oil prices, leading to declines in silver and gold prices amid inflation concerns and geopolitical tensions.
